subcodes.first_line: O Companion of the yearning hearts! Praise be to God that the musk-laden breeze hath wafted from the amber-scented pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مونس قلوب مشتاقین لله الحمد که نفحه مشکین که از مهب خامه عنبرین سطوع یافته
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
